name: health-intelligence-system
description: Sovereign Health Intelligence plugin for private health vault setup, wearable-data ingestion, wellness optimization loops, clinician-safe possibility mapping, and doctor-visit preparation.

interface.shortDescription: Build a private health operating system.
interface.longDescription: Health Intelligence System helps coding agents set up local-first private health vaults, wearable-data ingestion workflows, wellness optimization loops, clinician-safe possibility maps, and doctor-visit handoff packets without diagnosing or prescribing.
defaultPrompt: Set up my private health vault.
Build a weekly health operator loop.
